arts.ttl: Newcastle's St James' Park plan is the biggest stadium crime in modern football
arts.sum: A brand new arena or a massive redevelopment project seems inevitable at Newcastle United but it would be a shame to take the bulldozers to the existing St James' Park

arts.ttl: MARTIN KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: How Eddie Howe's masterclass suffocated Arsenal
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: Newcastle's victory over Arsenal in the Carabao Cup semi-final was secured across two of the proudest nights of Eddie Howe 's managerial career.

arts.ttl: Liverpool manager Arne Slot sends out a warning to the Reds' rivals after tearing Tottenham apart to set-up Carabao Cup final with Newcastle
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE AT ANFIELD: Arne Slot warned that Liverpool are only getting stronger after they booked their spot in next month's Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Newcastle troll Arsenal & Mikel Arteta after Carabao Cup semi-final triumph
arts.sum: Those comments were followed by a drastic downturn in form from City, which Arsenal fans were only too eager to remind him about, and the Gunners' recent 5-1 win saw Myles Lewis-Skelly copy Haaland's goal celebration before Kendrick Lamar's Humble was played over the speakers to celebrate the victory. Newcastle United gleefully took aim at Arsenal on social media after the Magpies' Carabao Cup semi-final victory on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Preview: Famalicao vs. Vitoria de Guimaraes - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Primeira Liga clash between Famalicao and Vitoria de Guimaraes, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: FA Cup predictions: Birmingham can dump out Newcastle
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight as he analyses the weekend's FA Cup fourth-round action and makes a case for Birmingham to beat Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Wembley redemption awaits for Newcastle United and this one feels very different
arts.sum: As for Nick Pope, seen as United's No 1 from the day he signed, it would mean missing out on two successive finals having been suspended for a single match - the match - last time. League One leaders Birmingham, a club with a past but a limited present, are the opposition at the end of a long week of variety which has seen United play in the Premier League, Carabao Cup and now FA Cup. Do Newcastle need to keep going when the League Cup and Champions League qualification dominates the mind?

arts.ttl: Arsenal Isak LATEST, Man Utd eye WONDERKID, Chelsea line up SWAP transfer: FT Recap
arts.sum: Arsenal Isak LATEST, Man Utd eye WONDERKID, Chelsea line up SWAP transfer: FT Recap The January transfer window may have just closed but the news continues to develop as teams prepare for the remainder of the season and make plans for the summer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 4-0 Tottenham (4-1 aggregate): Arne Slot's side reach Carabao Cup final after four-goal demolition - with Reds set to face Newcastle at Wembley
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN AT ANFIELD: Postecoglou said before kick-off that his team would play on the front foot but that didn't turn out to be the case at all. Quite the opposite was true.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe has worked wonders at Newcastle - but don't compare him to Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Newcastle defeated Arsenal 4-0 in the Carabao Cup final, with Eddie Howe seeing his team win the second leg 2-0 on Wednesday night to beat Mikel Arteta and reach the final at Wembley
